notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Junior Caminero batting, Chandler Simpson picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge steals (2) 2nd base. Aaron Judge to 3rd. Aaron Judge advances to 3rd, on a missed catch error by shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Brent Headrick. Ben Williamson to 3rd. Taylor Walls to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ben Rice pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice homers (4) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Trent Grisham pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham pops out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
